title: macrosamanea longiflora
intro: Macrosamanea longiflora, also known as the long-flowered samane tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Macrosamanea longiflora include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Macrosamanea longiflora often involve its leaves being dried and ground into a powder, which can be used as a tea or added to topical creams for medicinal purposes.
